name: totem-tool
description: TOTeM-Tool - React + Django + Electron Desktop App

scripts.install-all: cd backend && python -m venv venv && source venv/Scripts/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install -e ../totem_lib && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../electron && npm install
scripts.start-backend: cd backend && source venv/Scripts/activate && python manage.py runserver 8000
scripts.start-backend-mac: cd backend && source ./venv/bin/activate && python manage.py runserver 8000
scripts.build:copy-resources: shx rm -rf electron/resources && shx mkdir -p electron/resources/frontend-build && shx mkdir -p electron/resources/backend && shx cp -r frontend/dist/. electron/resources/frontend-build/ && shx cp -r backend/. electron/resources/backend/ && shx cp -r totem_lib electron/resources/totem_lib
scripts.build:setup-backend: cd electron/resources/backend && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -e ../totem_lib && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe manage.py migrate && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe manage.py loaddata initial_user.json
scripts.build-all: npm run build-frontend && npm run build:copy-resources && npm run build:setup-backend && npm run build-electron-win
scripts.electron-dev: concurrently "npm run start-backend" "wait-on http://localhost:8000 && npm run start-frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run start-electron"
scripts.electron-dev-mac: concurrently "npm run start-backend-mac" "npm run start-frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 --delay 1000 && npm run start-electron"
